name: Charlotte Tilbury
description: The MECCA view Nourish lips while you wrap them in saturated, multi-dimensional colour with Charlotte Tilbury’s K.I.S.S.I.N.G collection. Formulated with a special blend of waxes to ensure this lipstick glides over the contours of your lips, with no bleeding or feathering. The range serves up deep plums, neutral nudes, poppy pinks and dangerous reds—the perfect addition to any lipstick wardrobe, this formula will be your new go-to fast. 90's Pink, Icon Baby, Candy Chic, Red Carpet Pink, Rose to Fame, Love Bite, Night Crimson, Nude Kate, Pillow Talk Intense, Stoned Rose, Nude Romance and Velvet Underground are vegan shades, containing no animal products or derivatives of animal products. Parabens and Sulphates (SLS & SLES) Apply the lipstick straight from the bullet or use a lip brush for a more precise finish.

name: Yves Saint Laurent
description: Feel the love with YSL Lovenude Lip Blusher, a soft blurring lip colour that will give you an after French kissed lips effect. Full Like A Blur: 7H Blur finish, soft buildable wear. Care Like A Balm: 84% lip care base for instant hydration, lip line eraser effect for softer-looking lips.Colour like a blush: bare lip texture for true nude colour expression. A unique formula infused with an active level of 3% of pro-xylane with black nigella sativa seed and blueberry extracts. Fragranced with an addictive blend of berries - blackberry, blueberry and wild cherry that both smells and tastes unforgettably good. Choose from light nude to intense brown shades. 3% Pro-xylane: Highest active-level in make-up with a x3 Fuller actions on blur, hydration and bounciness. YSL Lovenude signature ingredient: Black nigella sativa seed from the YSL Ourika Community Garden in Marrakech, Morocco. Known for regenerative action. Blueberry Extract: Known for its action on lip comfort.

name: NARS
description: Discover long-lasting comfort in a high-end dimensional satin finish with vibrant, pure-color payoff and creamy, smudge-resistant wear. New precision-tip bullet defines and contours for sculpted sophistication, while Luxe Comfort Complex hugs lips for lightweight, medium-to-full coverage. Made without Alcohol, Parabens and Sulphates (SLS & SLES)

name: Charlotte Tilbury
description: The sheer embrace of a lipstick. The nourishing touch of a balm. The just-kissed imprint of a tint. Why have one when you can all three? Powered by Charlotte’s PH custom colour chemistry, it blooms with the natural chemistry of your lips for a blushed-from-within stain effect that’s uniquely yours and lasts for up to 8 hours*, like an in-love rose petal veil! Enriched with a dewy, cushioning blend of 92% botanical butters and oils + youth-boosting peptides, it’s a lip-blush effect that loves your lips and leaves them feeling petal soft! It hydrates for up to 24 hours*! It replenishes, replumps + retexturises the look of lips! And it optically fills in lip lines for a blurred, diffused effect that makes your lips look naturally beautified, bigger and sweeter in seconds! Powered by pH Custom Colour Technology™, Pillow Talk Blush Balm Lip Tints adapt to your unique lip chemistry, giving a personalised, just‑kissed tint that enhances your natural beauty. Youth‑boosting peptides smooth, hydrate and reduce the look of lines so lips appear plumper and firmer. A blend of shea, cocoa and kokum butters wraps lips in long‑lasting moisture for a soft, blurred, rosebud finish. One swipe delivers comfortable colour, care and glow all day.

name: ILIA Beauty
description: The creamy comfort of a lipstick. The precision of a lip liner. This weightless crayon glides on smoothly, delivering rich, 12-hour color. Powered by hyaluronic acid and marine plant extracts, it’s clinically proven to hydrate, plump, smooth, and strengthen the skin barrier with every wear. Key ingredients: Sea Succulent: Boosts hydration and helps replenish the skin barrier over time. Hyaluronic Acid: Attracts moisture to smooth and plump for fuller-looking lips. Seaweed Extract: Visibly improves lip definition and volume. Fragrance, Parabens, Silicones and Sulphates (SLS & SLES) Consumer testing results Instantly: 100% said lips were smoothed*, 98% said lips looked fuller*

name: Charlotte Tilbury
description: Buildable, colour-rich lipsticks that pay tribute to famous pouts, their signature lip colours and preferred finishes. Muted nudes, creamy mattes and poppy reds that will quickly become your go-to lip too. The collection features wearable, ultra-pigmented lipstick inspired by celebrity clients. Application is straightforward—apply directly from the bullet for quick colour. Several shades are vegan formulations free from animal products or derivatives.

name: Tom Ford
description: A sleek lipstick in a stiletto case formulated with waxes and rich emollients for high coverage with a silky, lightweight feel. The formula creates a cushioned film of vibrant, glowing colour with extreme comfort. Apply directly to lips or with a lip brush. Available in 9 shades including Casablanca, Scarlet, Rouge Iconic, Nude Slip, 100 Nubile, Rose Coset, Velvet Tux, and First Look.

name: Clinique
description: Sheer, buildable lipstick that melts into lips. This emollient-rich formula features a satin finish with sheer coverage and is fragrance-free. The product delivers a sleek, soft-shine finish by blending warm and cool pigments with your natural lip colour. It can be applied alone, layered under other lip products, or built up for increased colour intensity. Available in three adaptable shades: Black Honey (deep berry-wine), Nude Honey (sheer nude), and Pink Honey (soft pink).

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: 12 hour, full-coverage, silky-matte lipstick featuring a creamy formula with coconut oil, shea butter, and cocoa butter. The product delivers rich pigmentation in a wide shade range with a matte finish, providing long-lasting colour that leaves lips appearing fuller. The case includes at least 30% recycled content material.

name: MECCA MAX
description: Sheer, hydrating lipstick with a balmy finish. The product features a creamy, hydrating formula that delivers a glossy-but-not-sticky finish with a wash of juicy, lip-plumping colour. Available in ten shades ranging from fleshy nudes to soft rosy hues. The lipstick is vegan and cruelty-free, swipes on effortlessly, and leaves lips feeling comfortable and moisturised.

name: MECCA MAX
description: A tinted lip stain with a balmy finish that wears like a balm, stays like a tint, shines like a gloss. The formula features a non-sticky application that delivers hydrated, stained lips with lasting colour. Available in six wearable shades ranging from bright pinks and reds to deeper hues and neutrals. The product is 100% vegan and cruelty-free, designed to be layered with lip oils or glosses for extended shine.

name: Morphe
description: Treat lips to a softly plumped look, gently hydrated feel, and flawlessly filtered finish with new Lip Filter Hydroplump Soft Matte Lipstick. Infused with a plumping peptide, jojoba seed oil, and mango butter, Lip Filter glides on with a silky smooth texture, soft vanilla scent, and diffused matte finish.

name: VIOLETTE_FR
description: A moisturising matte lipstick-meets-balm hybrid that imparts a sheer kiss of colour with a subtle blurring effect. The formula mimics the true texture of your lips for an authentic just-bitten lips look inspired by French beauty traditions. Apply once for a natural flush or layer up to three coats for buildable colour intensity. Made without parabens and sulphates.

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: A sleek satin lipstick with pigment-rich colour featuring full coverage, satin finish, and longwear properties. The formula provides eight hours of comfort and hydration with pomegranate flower extract, camellia seed, and rosehip oils. It delivers full-coverage, pigment-rich colour in 34 shades, works on both lips and cheeks, plumps lips through moisturisation, and reduces the appearance of fine lines. The lipstick case includes PCR material and features the signature vanilla scent.

name: Stila
description: The Calligraphy Lip Stain is a revolutionary, double-duty lip stain featuring a unique two-way applicator with a blade-like tip that can be used on point for definition or on edge for full coverage. It delivers sheer, lightweight, and buildable pout-perfect pops of colour with an 8-hour wear time. The formula is transfer-proof, smudge-proof, and vegan, designed to remain through the day while subtly fading to a natural wash of colour. The product provides even colour distribution and doesn't feather or bleed.

name: Yves Saint Laurent
description: Hydrating, wet shine lipstick that delivers 24H dripping hydration with a transformative texture transitioning from lipstick to wet-shine lip oil. Features buildable, light-reflecting semi-sheer finish in luscious colours, leaving lips appearing healthy and lustrous.

name: MECCA MAX
description: Long-lasting, pigment-packed liquid lipstick that features a non-drying matte formula available in eight inclusive shades. The vegan, cruelty-free product delivers full coverage and longwear performance, designed to stay put without cracking. It pairs well with lip liners for definition or can be layered under balmy stains for a dewy finish.

name: Morphe
description: A kiss of air-whipped, soft matte lipstick. This innovative lip mousse features a buildable matte finish with an air-whipped texture that melts into lips. The formula resists settling into lines, smudging, or fading while delivering a soft focus effect and velvety smooth feel. Enriched with vitamin E for nourishment, it's available in 10 shades.

name: Anastasia Beverly Hills
description: A velvet-smooth lip mousse with weightless, full pigment, true-matte colour featuring a cushioned, comfortable wear and smoothing lip finish. It includes a multifunctional, teardrop-shaped cushioned wand for lining and application. The product comes in 14 shade options and is designed to provide full-pigment, true-matte soft focus colour.

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: Liquid lipstick with 24 hours of matte colour featuring Pigment Lock Technology for kissproof, transfer-proof, and waterproof wear. The formula combines full coverage with comfort, enriched with passion fruit oil, coconut oil, and shea butter. It offers a flexible, breathable veil of colour with no bleeding, feathering, or touch-ups needed. The slanted, tapered precision applicator ensures smooth, even application, and the formula is designed for easy removal.

name: Shiseido
description: Vibrant lipstick shades with a matte finish. This full coverage lipstick delivers colours inspired by Tokyo's nightlife with a powder matte finish. It features an eight-hour wear time, enhanced with nourishing waxes and oils. The formula includes velvet powders for a soft-focus matte finish, optical brightening pigments for colour vibrancy, and lightweight waxes and oils for smooth application and lip hydration. Made without parabens and sulphates (SLS & SLES).

name: RMS Beauty
description: A long-lasting, non-drying serum lipstick hybrid that provides subtle nude drama and coverage with one swipe. The water-based formula features Organic Bitter Cherry Fruit Water for hydration, an RMS Adaptogenic Herbal Blend to balance and soften, and Kakadu Plum Extract for antioxidant protection. It delivers a lightweight, satin finish without heaviness, created in five nude shades. Vegan, fragrance-free, and made without parabens, silicones, or sulphates.

name: Kylie Cosmetics
description: A plumping liquid lipstick featuring a matte finish. This highly pigmented formula blurs lip lines and delivers full coverage with up to 12-hour wear. The liquid-to-powder texture glides on seamlessly without streaks, leaving a lightweight, soft-matte finish that doesn't bleed or feather. Formulated with HotFlux® technology to actively plump lips while smoothing lines for a diffused lip look. Vegan and fragrance-free.

name: Glossier
description: A demi-matte, bold liquid lip cream with a cream formula that glides on like butter, leaving you with velvety, high-impact payoff in one swipe. The formula features rose wax silica for a soft-touch feel, orchid complex for easy application, and black raspberry seed oil for moisturising benefits. Available in 8 shades including warm peony pink, dusty peach, deep burgundy, and rich fuchsia berry. Vegan, longwear, full coverage product made without artificial fragrance, parabens, or sulphates.

name: BYREDO
description: Colour-drenched saturation and addictive shine in a single stroke. With ten neutral nudes to choose from, Liquid Lipstick Vinyl nourishes and envelops lips with a high-wattage, glossy finish. The creamy vegan blend of oils and shea butter delivers hours of comfort thanks to its non-bleeding, non-sticky, and non-drying formulation. Offered in a range of cool, neutral and warm undertones, there's a shade to suit every complexion/skin tone, with endless possibilities for instinctive expression.

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: Lightweight liquid matte lipstick that provides all day bold colour with one glide and delivers eight hours of wear, without the worry of feathering or smudging. Features a matte finish with full coverage and a precise applicator tip for easy application and lip definition. Available in multiple shades ranging from peachy nudes to plums. Product size: 5mL.

name: Ellis Faas
description: A subtle and light-weight lip stain with a glossy, satin finish and medium coverage. Features a unique fluid formula with a built-in brush that delivers a stained lip effect without feeling heavy. The highly-pigmented formula is free from taste or scent, suitable for all skin tones, and contains Vitamin E and emollient oils to nourish lips. Available in 9 shades ranging from Blood Red to Toffee Beige, paraben-free.

name: Clinique
description: Long-lasting, feel-good colour for lips that glides on effortlessly and delivers ultra-pigmented, full-coverage colour with 8-hour, colour-true wear. Features a satin finish, includes a built-in primer for smooth application, and suits all lip types and skin tones. Made without parabens.

name: Urban Decay
description: Bonded colour that won't let go! This lipstick features intense colour with a satin finish and full coverage. The formula delivers instant-shine with one-swipe application while remaining comfortable to wear and moisturised. It offers smudge-proof wear that is transfer-proof, and food + water resistant lasting up to 16 hours. The vegan formula applies without stickiness and requires oil-based remover. Available in 12 shades with a glossy finish.

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: A kissproof lipstick with 24 hours of wear. The product features transfer-resistant, waterproof formula with an ultra-precise slim stick delivering full-coverage matte finish. It includes FlexiLock Technology for flexible, long-wearing coverage and conditioning passion fruit oil for comfortable wear. The lipstick is smudge-resistant, bleed-resistant, feather-resistant, flake-resistant, and crease-resistant with a non-caking formula.
